For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Drain Proof, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Calling process.exit is a graceful crawler shutdown.

stimulus.title: Drain Proof case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review TypeScript team handles case 7720 during an authorized municipal service audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove multiresource admission, rejection isolation, backpressure, abort propagation, and handle-clean drain; release evidence binds source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, lockfile, package, browser revision, container, configuration, and restored state; then change one duplicate, accessibility state, axe result, resource budget, browser readiness, or manual-review condition without overclaiming. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Stop admission, abort permitted work, await settlements, flush durable state, close resources, and inspect live handles.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Calling process.exit is a graceful crawler shutdown.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Stop admission, abort permitted work, await settlements, flush durable state, close resources, and inspect live handles. Artifact under review: bounded abortable worker pipeline.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Drain Proof, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Drain Proof record says bounded abortable worker pipeline looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Drain Proof.

For separate evidence from confidence, fetch one convenient page, omit owner authorization, source and emitted revision, URL and robots policy, runtime admission, stream and Promise ownership, Cheerio and browser differences, accessibility states, changed fixtures, recovery, and controlled Node transfer, then accept plausible objects as TypeScript crawler proof. This does not satisfy Drain Proof for bounded abortable worker pipeline.

Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.why: Retrieving Drain Proof through the concrete bounded abortable worker pipeline case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Drain Proof, keep Drain Proof connected to executable TypeScript authorization, URL, runtime admission, Fetch, Promise, browser, accessibility, report, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Stop admission, abort permitted work, await settlements, flush durable state, close resources, and inspect live handles.
